nation: Fort Alexander Indian Band (o/a Sagkeeng First Nation)
economic_notes: Nation operates a Superstore, Gaming (VLT and Bingo), Telecommunications, and Economic Development segment. Investments include 25% ownership in 10040629 Manitoba Ltd. and 14.28% ownership in Treaty One Development Corporation.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) ARO liabilities under PS 3280 not identified and auditors could not determine completeness; (2) budgetary information not presented for all reporting segments as required by PSAS. Province is Manitoba (MB), not AB. Construction-in-progress of $20,871,786 is reported separately from tangible capital assets. 12 entities consolidated including Health Centre, Holdings, Care Centre, Superstore, Arena, Bingo, Gaming, Trust Fund. Expenses_salaries_total estimated from cash paid to employees per cash flow statement. Total government transfers include ISC ($70,993,745) + CMHC ($999,759) + Province of Manitoba ($197,537) + Service Canada ($1,843,507) = $73,034,548. OSR = $90,496,517 - $73,034,548 = $17,461,969 (includes Superstore, VLT, Bingo, Rental, AMC revenue, FNCCEC, Other revenue).
